TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Abdel Fattah el-Sisi == ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Egypt ta' misuw hya' ga Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 1987 tehuk, mqwas biru sa General Command and Staff Course, Egyptian Command and Staff pqwsan biru krahu. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 1992 tehuk, mqwas biru sa General Command and Staff Course, Joint Command and Staff College, United Kingdom. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 2003 tehuk, mqwas biru sa War Course, Fellowship of the Higher War College, Nasser Military Academy, Egypt. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 2006 tehuk, mqwas biru sa War Course, United States Army War College, United States. qnxan nya Abdel Fattah el-Sisi maki tay kawas 1977 msqun ki Entissar Amer, tehuk misuw qani. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, minkahul sa Gamaleya na Egypt, 8 mtsswe kwara qutux ngasal nya. Entissar Amer ga, kneril ni Abdel Fattah el-Sisi. Mahmoud, Mostafa, Hassan, ki Aya ga, la'iy ni Abdel Fattah el-Sisi. mintzyuwaw nya maki sa kawas 2012, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw eɣjpt taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ɣeneral ʦ~ʨomman* an* s~ɕta** ʦ~ʨours~ɕe, eɣjptian ʦ~ʨomman* an* s~ɕta** pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ɣeneral ʦ~ʨomman* an* s~ɕta** ʦ~ʨours~ɕe, *oint ʦ~ʨomman* an* s~ɕta** ʦ~ʨolleɣe, unite* kiŋ*om. aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa war ʦ~ʨours~ɕe, *ellows~ɕħip o* tħe ħiɣħer war ʦ~ʨolleɣe, nas~ɕs~ɕer militarj aʦ~ʨa*emj, eɣjpt. aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa war ʦ~ʨours~ɕe, unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ armj war ʦ~ʨolleɣe, unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ. qnxan nja aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki entis~ɕs~ɕar amer, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, minkaħul s~ɕa ɣamaleja na eɣjpt, * mts~ɕs~ɕwe kwara qutux ŋas~ɕal nja. entis~ɕs~ɕar amer ɣa, kneril ni aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi. maħmou*, mos~ɕta*a, ħas~ɕs~ɕan, ki aja ɣa, laʔij ni aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi. mintzjuwaw nja maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: == Abdel Fattah el-Sisi == ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Egypt ta' misuw hya' ga Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 1987 tehuk, mqwas biru sa General Command and Staff Course, Egyptian Command and Staff pqwsan biru krahu. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 1992 tehuk, mqwas biru sa General Command and Staff Course, Joint Command and Staff College, United Kingdom. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 2003 tehuk, mqwas biru sa War Course, Fellowship of the Higher War College, Nasser Military Academy, Egypt. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 2006 tehuk, mqwas biru sa War Course, United States Army War College, United States. qnxan nya Abdel Fattah el-Sisi maki tay kawas 1977 msqun ki Entissar Amer, tehuk misuw qani. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, minkahul sa Gamaleya na Egypt, 8 mtsswe kwara qutux ngasal nya. Entissar Amer ga, kneril ni Abdel Fattah el-Sisi. Mahmoud, Mostafa, Hassan, ki Aya ga, la'iy ni Abdel Fattah el-Sisi. mintzyuwaw nya maki sa kawas 2012, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw eɣjpt taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ɣeneral ʦ~ʨomman* an* s~ɕta** ʦ~ʨours~ɕe, eɣjptian ʦ~ʨomman* an* s~ɕta** pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ɣeneral ʦ~ʨomman* an* s~ɕta** ʦ~ʨours~ɕe, *oint ʦ~ʨomman* an* s~ɕta** ʦ~ʨolleɣe, unite* kiŋ*om. aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa war ʦ~ʨours~ɕe, *ellows~ɕħip o* tħe ħiɣħer war ʦ~ʨolleɣe, nas~ɕs~ɕer militarj aʦ~ʨa*emj, eɣjpt. aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa war ʦ~ʨours~ɕe, unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ armj war ʦ~ʨolleɣe, unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ. qnxan nja aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki entis~ɕs~ɕar amer, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi, minkaħul s~ɕa ɣamaleja na eɣjpt, * mts~ɕs~ɕwe kwara qutux ŋas~ɕal nja. entis~ɕs~ɕar amer ɣa, kneril ni aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi. maħmou*, mos~ɕta*a, ħas~ɕs~ɕan, ki aja ɣa, laʔij ni aβ*el *attaħ el-s~ɕis~ɕi. mintzjuwaw nja maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
